receipt_date.text: ระหว่างวันที่

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( order by tab.approve_date ,tab.description ,tab.receipt_date ,tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( order by (select sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) WHEN sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no as receipt_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status as receipt_status ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) as sort_group_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.process_date
,(select sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) as approve_date
,(select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) as loan_approve_amount
,(select sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) as period_payment_amount
,case when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description|| ( select ' (*)' from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = trim( sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) and loan_code <> '0' ) when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISP' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description else sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name end as description
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id as entry_id
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order as sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name as money_type_name
,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,(CASE sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status WHEN '0' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ELSE 0 END) as principal_amount ,(CASE sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status WHEN '0' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ELSE 0 END) as interest_amount ,(CASE sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status WHEN '0' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ELSE 0 END) as item_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.ppm_status as ppm_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.keep_monthly as keep_monthly , (CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) ELSE sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type END) as loan_type ,( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as sum_rec ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date ,to_tdate(sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date) as tdate_cancel_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_id ,coalesce(sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_return,0) as money_trans_return , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) ) and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id -- and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ) -- and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type <> 'FBK' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ธ'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '10/03/2021' )tab
